title: AppResetAllMethod
description: Contract for app.resetAll JSON-RPC method. Truncates all user-data tables and resets settings to defaults; user-managed folders on disk are not deleted. Returns success; the renderer clears its query cache and navigates to /setup. Irreversible — all Skillbox metadata is lost.

restarting.description: Always true on success. The renderer uses this as a completion signal: it clears the TanStack Query cache and navigates to /setup.
